hooks.command: bash -c 'F=$(jq -r ".file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$F" ]] && [[ "$F" == *.env* || "$F" == *dev.vars* ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: Editing secret files (.env*, .dev.vars) is not allowed" >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'F=$(jq -r ".file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$F" =~ \.(tsx?|jsx?|mjs)$ ]] && [[ "$F" != *node_modules* ]] && [[ "$F" != *worker/* ]]; then npx eslint --fix --no-warn-ignored "$F" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'
